name: Red-Fluid of the Dragon
description:
Yearning to prove yourself, you train to become a knight's
squire. After finally besting your mentor, your village is
attacked, unlocking a dormant power within your red-
fluid.

name: Hunter Space Pirates
description:
At the tender age of three, our protagonist is
separated from his mother under mysterious
circumstances. A compassionate couple of
neighbors, mourning the loss of their own son,
adopt him. His foster father, a former Navy
combat pilot known as "Viper," nurtures his
passion for airplanes. However, tragedy strikes
when the couple is terminateed by a hungry
Grizzly bear. Now, on the cusp of adolescence,
the boy is sent to a foster home where he must
navigate life surrounded by four women. His
journey to discover his true self is accompanied
by a series of encounters with the girls at his
foster home, each interaction shaping his
understanding of relationships and desire.

name: Milfylicious (Chapter 1)
description: Great uncle Albert has passed away leaving our hero as the sole inherit or of his estate. Along with vast wealth and holdings, comes a solemn purpose, working on behalf of mankind in search of clean, renewable energy.

name: Sins of Night
description:
It's a night like any other. Endless deliveries, shady
customers, and the looming threat of financial ruin. Little
could make things worse, but death can come swiftly in
this city.

name: Free Pass
description: A happily married Asian woman, born and raised in cultural strict country, was convinced to rist her marriage after being a faithful wife for many years. What will happen if you give this woman a "Free Pass"
